activities_projects.title: Doppler Effect Observation
activities_projects.objective: Understand change in frequency due to relative motion
steps: Strike the whistle or bell while moving past a listener
Listen to frequency change as it approaches and recedes
Record observations and relate to Doppler effect
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands frequency variation due to relative motion

activities_projects.title: Measuring Speed of Sound Using Resonance Tube
activities_projects.objective: Calculate speed of sound using resonance
steps: Strike tuning fork and adjust water level in tube for resonance
Measure length of air column at resonance for multiple frequencies
Calculate speed of sound using v = f × λ
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies resonance and wavelength concepts to calculate sound speed

activities_projects.title: Interference of Sound Waves
materials: Two identical speakers or tuning forks
steps: Place two sound sources at a fixed distance apart
Move along a line to observe loud and soft regions
Record positions of maximum and minimum sound
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands interference patterns and path difference

activities_projects.title: Measuring Beat Frequency
activities_projects.objective: Calculate frequency difference between two sources
materials: Two tuning forks of close frequencies
steps: Strike both tuning forks simultaneously
Count number of beats per second
Calculate frequency difference = beat frequency
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies beat phenomenon to measure frequency differences

activities_projects.title: Sound Intensity and Energy Loss
activities_projects.objective: Measure energy loss with distance and medium
steps: Play sound of fixed intensity
Measure intensity at different distances
Measure intensity after passing through different materials
Analyze energy loss
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands intensity variation with distance and medium absorption

activities_projects.title: Standing Waves in Air Column
activities_projects.objective: Observe and calculate wavelengths for standing waves
steps: Strike tuning fork and adjust water level to produce loudest sound
Measure air column length for fundamental and overtone frequencies
Calculate wavelength using tube length and resonance conditions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies standing wave theory to real-life measurements

activities_projects.title: Effect of Temperature on Speed of Sound
activities_projects.objective: Observe how temperature changes speed of sound
steps: Measure air temperature
Strike tuning fork and adjust tube for resonance
Calculate speed of sound at measured temperature
Compare with speed at different temperatures
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands temperature dependence of sound speed

activities_projects.title: Multiple Echoes and Sound Reflection
steps: Produce sound near walls
Record multiple echoes
Measure time intervals and analyze reflection paths
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands multiple reflections and echo timing

activities_projects.title: Frequency Analysis of Musical Notes
activities_projects.objective: Measure and compare frequencies of musical notes
steps: Play different musical notes
Measure frequency using app or tuning device
Compare frequencies and record patterns in octaves
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyzes pitch and frequency relationships in music

activities_projects.title: Sound Absorption and Damping
activities_projects.objective: Measure energy loss due to absorption by different materials
steps: Produce sound of fixed intensity
Place different materials between sound source and listener
Measure intensity reduction and analyze absorption efficiency
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands damping and sound absorption in real-world scenarios
activities_projects.evaluation: Accurate measurement, calculation, and reasoning (10 marks)
